title: ImmersiveOres - Immersified
description: Made to make the progression of the armors and tools in ImmersiveOres feel more interesting.
body:
This resource pack aims to make the progression in ImmersiveOres feel a little more interesting!



Whats changed  -

### Vibranium -
- Armor sprites and models
- All weapon and tool sprites
    - Sword handheld model has been resized, now slightly larger than the default
- Ingot, ore, nugget, and stick sprites touched up to match armor and tool colors
- Horse armor


### Vulpus -
- Slight color tweak  -  orangeish red to deep red
- Armor sprites and models
- All weapon and tool sprites
    - Sword and Axe handheld models have been resized as well, a little larger than the vibranium sword
- Ore block, raw ore block, ore, ingot, nugget, and stick sprites/models touched up to match armor and tool colors
- Horse armor


### Enderium - 
- Complete colorscheme overhaul
- Armor sprites and models
- All weapon and tool sprites
    - Sword and Axe handhelds also got resized, the biggest and baddest of the trio
- Ore block, raw ore block, ore, block, ingot, nugget, and stick sprites/models all recolored to fit the rest of the colorscheme
- Horse armor



This pack goes well with [Spryzeen's Knight Armor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spryzeens-knight-armor) by Spryzeen and [Tools Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tools-reimagined-java) by KhalMika, as they were inspired by these great textures. And of course, credits to the original mod owner block_legend001 for creating the mod!

This is my first ever resource pack, I hope you all enjoy (: 

Higher version support is planned as the mod gets updated 

[working on making more unique and vanilla friendly textures for each of the armors and sprucing up some of the tool textures]
